alt: Very young sea otter pup floating at the surface
caption: A newborn sea otter pup floats because its fur traps so much air.
acquisitionNotes: Core article image curated separately from the otter gallery set. Re-synced canonical Commons URL. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/3/3f/A_newborn_baby_Sea_Otter%2C_Enhydra_lutris%2C_Morro_Bay.jpg
